ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_chart" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Size label (e.g., S, M, L, XL, 2XL) */,
  "bust" REAL /* Measurement of the bust in cm */,
  "waist" REAL /* Measurement of the waist in cm */,
  "hips" REAL /* Measurement of the hips in cm */,
  "dress_length" REAL /* Length of the dress in cm */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the size, including how it fits */,
  "fit_type" TEXT /* Type of fit (e.g., Slim, Regular, Relaxed) */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the dress (e.g., Cotton, Silk) */,
  "care_instructions" TEXT /* Care instructions for the dress */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image showing the dress in the specified size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to size_id from size_chart */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product associated with this size */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Number of items available in stock for this size */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last inventory update */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse or store location where the inventory is kept */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES product ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_chart ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., Dresses, Shirts) */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the review was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES product ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reviews_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_chart ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
